For the most mindful & discerning hotels,restaurants,events & homes. Spring waters artfully & sustainably served through a closed loop glass bottle service & minimalist aluminum cans. Choose your waters & we deliver to your door. We pick up empties when we drop your new order. Simple.

With eco anxiety mounting around the climate crises, oceans filling with plastics and a recycling system rife with inefficiencies, we had no choice but to create a mindful business with wellbeing and sustainability at its core.

Think of us,as a minimalist milkman. Our beverages come in premium refillable glass bottles. Our crates are made from100% recycled plastic and can last 30 plus years. We now offer minimalist aluminum cans in plastic free outer packaging.

Need more info___how to order at a glance.

1 Select your 6 packs or a subscription for delivery in the GTA. 6 packs have a $5.75 delivery fee. If you do not answer or pick up your crate when messaged at delivery time, we will not leave it due to theft risk. A $7 delivery fee will be charged to you to return to your home with your order. We drop within 48hrs or less of your order being placed. A drop day and time window will be emailed to you. Exception*orders placed on Fridays will be delivered on the following Monday. Our 5 drop days are MONDAY to FRIDAY.

All orders placed for 6 packs must be returned or re-ordered within 60 days. A pick up charge of $7.75 will be charged for all packs kept for more that 60 days.

2 To re-up simply order again and we will email you a delivery window. We pick-up your empties when we drop new. We don’t like contracts but if you want an order repeated we can create a weekly or bi-weekly schedule for you.

3 If you want your bottles picked-up, email us your address and phone number and we will schedule a a pick-up window. Email concierge@larkdff.com

NOTE: We currently don’t charge a deposit fee, but if bottles and crates are not returned a fee of $44 (per 6 bottles + crate) will be billed to you to cover our packaging costs. Breakage happens, but if you break one of our highly durable bottles a $4.00 fee will be charged to you. All bottles and crates are property of lark inc.
